title: Smoky Ukrainian Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from Ukraine, made with tender pork and a rich smoky broth.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the pork pieces in batches until browned on all sides.
Remove the browned pork from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened.
Add the chopped carrot and potato to the pot and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the tomato paste, beef broth, water, brown sugar, thyme, salt, and black pepper to the pot.
Return the browned pork to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 hours or until the pork is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Let the stew rest for 10 minutes before serving.
